title: Oxford Economics launches AskOE Executive Lens
author: Sally Li
text:
NEWS

30 Jun 2026

Oxford Economics launches AskOE Executive Lens 

Oxford Economics today announced the beta launch of AskOEAI Executive Lens, a new conversational AI agent that personalises Oxford Economics’ insights based on each user’s organisation, sector, geography and role. 

Available as part of the expanding AskOEAI platform, Executive Lens enables users to ask questions in natural language and receive tailored responses that connect economic developments directly to what they mean for their business, helping them move from question to insight, and from insight to decision, more quickly. 

“Our clients don’t need more information. They need answers that are rigorous enough to be trusted and specific enough to be useful. For more than four decades, Oxford Economics has built its reputation on delivering trusted economic insight. Executive Lens extends that expertise by making our analysis more accessible, more relevant and easier to apply to each client’s unique business context,” said Martina Bozadzhieva, Head of Corporate Advisory, Oxford Economics. 

Unlike general-purpose AI tools, Executive Lens is purpose-built by Oxford Economics’ economists and technology team and draws exclusively on Oxford Economics’ proprietary analysis and forecasts. It is trained to surface the right research, apply the right logic and structure responses around each user’s goals. Rather than simply summarising information, it helps users understand how economic developments could affect their markets, operations and strategic decisions. 

“AI should make trusted expertise easier to access, not replace it. Since launching AskOEAI in September 2024, we have continued to invest in AI capabilities that help clients engage with our research more effectively. Executive Lens is the next step in that journey, bringing greater personalisation to our AI platform while maintaining the rigour, transparency and quality that clients expect from Oxford Economics. As we continue to expand the AskOEAI platform, our focus remains on helping clients unlock the power of economics by turning trusted insight into better decisions,” said Innes McFee, CEO, Oxford Economics. 

AskOEAI Executive Lens is available in beta today. Existing users can access Executive Lens directly within the AskOE platform. Organisations interested in exploring the capability can click here to arrange a trial.

Request a trial

About Oxford Economics 

Oxford Economics is the world’s foremost independent economic advisory firm. Covering over 200 countries, 100 industrial sectors and 8,000 cities and regions, we provide insights and solutions that empower clients to make informed decisions faster in an increasingly complex and uncertain world.
